title: [Cobblemon] Salt's Cosmeticmons!
description: A small Cobblemon add-on that gives certain Pokémon cosmetic outfits based of different things!
body:
# What this add-on adds!
This Cobblemon add-on is intended to add purely visual cosmetic costumes to certain Pokémon, based of off games, movies and or other pop culture things!
## What Pokémon have cosmetics
So far these are the Pokémon with cosmetics. Their shinys also have cosmetic versions:

**Garchomp**- Use cyan dye to turn it into the beloved Ikea shark Blahaj! With a shiny referencing the Transgender flag :3

**Ursaring**- Use a Totem of undying on it to turn it into Freddy Fazbear! With a shiny based on Golden Freddy.

**Scovillain**- Use a Sunflower on it to turn it into a Peashooter and Repeater from Plants Vs Zombies. With a shiny referencing the Snow Pea and Fire Peashooter!
